description_long: This object is a standard traffic cone, featuring a conical shape with a wide, square base for stability. The cone is primarily orange with two broad, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling its upper and middle sections, enhancing visibility in low-light conditions. The surface of the cone shows signs of dirt and wear, particularly near the base, indicating outdoor use. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the cone. The base is black, flat, and appears to be made of a heavier material to prevent tipping, with a slightly textured surface for grip. No logos or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a sturdy black base, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and a black base, with visible dirt near the base.
description_view_1: Front-aligned view displaying the cones in a row, emphasizing the symmetry and reflective stripes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the same orange and white pattern and visible dirt on the base.
description_view_3: Rear-aligned view showing the cones in a line, highlighting the uniformity and base structure.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper and middle sections of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and black, appearing thick and made of rubber for stability, with a slightly textured surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, especially near the base, indicating outdoor use.
